title: microrrhinum idaeum
intro: Microrrhinum idaeum, also known as Wild Chamomile or Mayweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Microrrhinum idaeum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Microrrhinum idaeum can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
